name: AcSiP Technology Corp.
summary: AcSiP Technology Corp., an Internet of Things solution company, provides wireless communication services and solutions in Taiwan. The company offers wireless connectivity solutions, including Bluetooth, NFC, Zigbee, GPS, 2G, 4G, and IoT-Wi-Fi and loT-LoRa products, as well as development kits. It also provides system integration and size shrinkage services. AcSiP Technology Corp. was founded in 2009 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
